meta.title: Plugin Developer Lab
meta.description: A WordPress Playground lab for plugin development with Query Monitor, Debug Bar, log viewing, WP-CLI, and a sample plugin scaffold.
meta.author: wpblueprints

siteOptions.blogdescription: Query Monitor, Debug Bar, log viewing, and a sample plugin scaffold.

files.plugin-dev-lab-sample.php:
<?php
/**
 * Plugin Name: Plugin Dev Lab Sample
 * Description: A tiny scaffold plugin for testing hooks, admin notices, REST routes, and debug logs in WordPress Playground.
 * Version: 0.1.0
 * Author: WP Blueprints
 */

if ( ! defined( 'ABSPATH' ) ) {
	exit;
}

define( 'PDLS_VERSION', '0.1.0' );
define( 'PDLS_PLUGIN_FILE', __FILE__ );
define( 'PDLS_PLUGIN_DIR', plugin_dir_path( __FILE__ ) );

require_once PDLS_PLUGIN_DIR . 'includes/class-plugin-dev-lab-sample.php';

add_action( 'plugins_loaded', array( 'Plugin_Dev_Lab_Sample', 'init' ) );

includes.class-plugin-dev-lab-sample.php:
Plugin Dev Lab Sample: scaffold active. Try Query Monitor, Debug Bar, REST route /wp-json/plugin-dev-lab/v1/status, and the debug log.

'; } public static function register_rest_routes() { register_rest_route( 'plugin-dev-lab/v1', '/status', array( 'methods' => 'GET', 'callback' => array( __CLASS__, 'get_status' ), 'permission_callback' => '__return_true', ) ); } public static function get_status() { return rest_ensure_response( array( 'plugin' => 'Plugin Dev Lab Sample', 'version' => PDLS_VERSION, 'debug' => defined( 'WP_DEBUG' ) && WP_DEBUG, 'time' => current_time( 'mysql' ), ) ); } public static function write_debug_marker() { if ( defined( 'WP_DEBUG' ) && WP_DEBUG ) { error_log( 'Plugin Dev Lab Sample loaded at ' . current_time( 'mysql' ) ); } } }

files.readme.txt:
=== Plugin Dev Lab Sample ===
Contributors: wpblueprints
Requires at least: 6.5
Tested up to: 6.6
Requires PHP: 8.1
Stable tag: 0.1.0
License: GPLv2 or later

A tiny scaffold plugin for WordPress Playground plugin development labs.

== Development Notes ==

* Admin notice confirms activation.
* REST endpoint: /wp-json/plugin-dev-lab/v1/status
* Debug marker writes to wp-content/debug.log when WP_DEBUG_LOG is enabled.
